headline: A Look At Cognizant Technology Solutions (CTSH) Valuation After New AI Partnerships And Contract Renewal
summary: Cognizant Technology Solutions (CTSH) has been in focus after renewing a multi million dollar digital transformation agreement with Travel + Leisure Co, while also expanding its Google Cloud partnership around enterprise scale AI and workflow offerings. See our latest analysis for Cognizant Technology Solutions. These AI focused deals come as Cognizant’s share price sits at US$66.26, with a 7 day share price return of 2.84% contrasting with a 30 day decline of 13.62% and an 18.97% fall in 1...

headline: Why Is Cognizant (CTSH) Down 14.4% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: Cognizant (CTSH) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Cognizant AI Deals Highlight Enterprise Focus And Valuation Opportunity
summary: Cognizant Technology Solutions (NasdaqGS:CTSH) expands its AI partnership with Google Cloud to support enterprise AI solutions. The company agrees a multi year AI and automation collaboration with a major commercial vehicle manufacturer to improve global workplace operations. Cognizant renews its digital transformation partnership with Travel + Leisure Co. to advance technology in the travel sector. These announcements put AI and large scale digital transformation at the center of...
